# preprocessing.split.split_rel_train_val_test { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.split.split_rel_train_val_test }

```python
preprocessing.split.split_rel_train_val_test(
    data,
    perc_train,
    perc_val,
    verbose=False,
)
```

Splits a time series DataFrame into training, validation, and test sets by percentages.

The test percentage is computed as 1 - perc_train - perc_val.
Sizes are rounded to ensure the splits sum to the full dataset size.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type                                           | Description                                | Default    |
|------------|------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|------------|
| data       | [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`) | The time series data with a DateTimeIndex. | _required_ |
| perc_train | [float](`float`)                               | Fraction of data used for training.        | _required_ |
| perc_val   | [float](`float`)                               | Fraction of data used for validation.      | _required_ |
| verbose    | [bool](`bool`)                                 | Whether to print additional information.   | `False`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                                                               | Description                                                                                                                                                 |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| tuple  | [tuple](`tuple`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | A tuple containing: - data_train (pd.DataFrame): The training set. - data_val (pd.DataFrame): The validation set. - data_test (pd.DataFrame): The test set. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.data.fetch_data import fetch_data
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.split import split_rel_train_val_test
>>> data = fetch_data()
>>> data_train, data_val, data_test = split_rel_train_val_test(
...     data,
...     perc_train=0.7,
...     perc_val=0.2,
...     verbose=True
... )
```
